source.name: Internal program tracker + field verification notes
source.citation: Content Catalyst LLC. Urban Tree Canopy Program tracker and field verification notes, 2026-Q2.
source.access_notes: Public example derived from a fictional program record.

confidence.basis: Verified site records plus partial field review.

method.notes: Current value combines verified site records with program-reported updates.
assumptions: Program-reported site updates use the same completeness rubric as the baseline.
limitations: Not all sites have independent third-party verification.
method.uncertainty: Moderate uncertainty remains for unverified sites.

records.reviewer_notes: Suitable for internal comparison with a visible verification limitation.

source.name: Supplier energy reports + procurement audit sample

confidence.basis: Supplier reports sampled against procurement records.

method.notes: Supplier-reported values were sampled against procurement records.
assumptions: Program-reported site updates use the same completeness rubric as the baseline.
limitations: Broader third-party verification is required before external claims.
